title: StreamingAppDataConnector - Metadata API
description: Represents the connection information specific to Web and Mobile Connectors.

dataConnectorType.description: The value of the field is restricted to SteamingApp.Possible values are: DataCloud StreamingApp

isProtected.description: An auto-generated value that doesn’t impact the behavior of the metadata type.

masterLabel.description: The display name of the connector.

streamingAppDataConnectorType.description: The type of connector.Possible values are: MobileApp WebApp
